title: pilostaxis arenicola
intro: Pilostaxis arenicola, also known as coastal polypody, is a type of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pilostaxis arenicola include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal purposes, with some herbal preparations also involving the use of the plant's leaves as a topical treatment for skin conditions.
